## Sales Data Entry Application - README.md

**Project Title:**  Sales Data Entry App

**Description:** This project creates a simple Windows Forms application to manage sales data entry. It allows users to input sales information, save the data in CSV format, and view existing records. 


**Feature
explanation: The team decided to build a simple app that helps with recording sales information. This will make tracking sales easier and more organized, improving our understanding of how much we're selling and where the sales are coming from.
